_comment: Phraseology-Hint matrix. First matching rule wins. Fields that are omitted match anything ('any' is also accepted explicitly). 'phase' and 'frequency_type' may be a single name or an array of names. 'tower_only' and 'post_landing' are booleans (omit = any). The READBACK override (atc_state_machine::is_readback_pending) and the cold-and-dark override (start_mode + com_radio_powered) are applied AFTER this lookup, so rules here only describe the steady-state intent menu.

_schema.intents: array of intent keys; empty array = no hints (UI shows tune-hint)

rules.comment: IDLE post-landing, on Ground freq while still rolling out / taxiing in: only taxi-to-parking is sensible.

Tower-only field post-landing on Tower freq: the same controller handles taxi-in. Offer both RUNWAY_VACATED (still rolling out) and REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING (once clear). The taxi_controller var renders 'Tower' in the phraseology, the freq filter is bypassed by the tower_only exception in the UI defense layer.
2-tier field post-landing on Tower freq: pilot owes RUNWAY_VACATED before retuning to Ground for the taxi-in.
IDLE cold start at parking: pilot must initiate contact on Ground.
Tower-only field, IDLE at parking on Tower freq: opening call is request-taxi addressed to Tower (collapse-to-tower handled by intent_category in UI).
IDLE at parking on Tower freq at a 2-tier field: leave hint list empty so UI prints 'Tune Ground first'.
IDLE at parking, no usable freq tuned: empty list, UI prints tune-hint.
IDLE airborne near airport on Tower (lost contact / fresh inbound): re-establish via INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.
IDLE airborne en-route on Approach: re-establish.
GROUND_CONTACT: pilot has greeted Ground, awaiting taxi clearance.
GROUND_CONTACT post-landing: REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING after greeting Ground for taxi-in.
TAXI_CLEARED: pilot is taxiing per clearance. The only legitimate prompt is a readback (handled by override). Empty list keeps the panel quiet.
TOWER_CONTACT at the holding point: pilot is ready for departure. Both pattern and cross-country variants offered.
TOWER_CONTACT inbound from approach (rare but possible): REPORT_POSITION variants.
DEPARTURE_CLEARED on the ground / takeoff roll: silent, awaiting auto-correction. Applies to both Pattern and XC departures.
DEPARTURE_CLEARED airborne (cross-country): pilot can request handoff or sign off.
PATTERN_ENTRY in the pattern: position reports + landing variants.
PATTERN_ENTRY on final: report final + go around.
LANDING_CLEARED airborne: pilot awaits readback (override) or may need GO_AROUND.
LANDING_CLEARED rolling out: pilot owes RUNWAY_VACATED.
TOUCH_AND_GO_CLEARED in the pattern: same flow as PATTERN_ENTRY plus go-around option.
EN_ROUTE on Approach: position report + handoff request.
EN_ROUTE near a tower-controlled airport: switch to inbound call.
EN_ROUTE without a relevant freq tuned: empty -> UI prints tune-hint.
APPROACH_CONTACT en-route: position report.
APPROACH_CONTACT in the pattern / on final.
Uncontrolled IDLE at parking: self-announce, optional radio check.
Uncontrolled IDLE airborne near a non-towered field: announce inbound on CTAF.
Uncontrolled UNICOM_ACTIVE: self-announce throughout the entire flight phase loop.
Final fallback: empty list. UI shows context-aware tune hint.
